edge_hypothesis: MACD 12:1 already ACCEPTed at PF=1.302 with the best trending PF of any strategy (2.177). This spec pushes the extreme R:R frontier to 15:1 and 18:1. At 15:1 R:R, only ~7.5% win rate is needed to be profitable after HyperLiquid fees (4.5bps taker + 1bps slippage). MACD histogram zero-crosses confirmed by EMA_50 are clean, non-repainting signals that should sustain this hit rate. The thesis: on crypto, signal quality is adequate — it's the R:R ratio that determines profitability. If 15:1 works, it proves the tail harvesting principle has further room to run. Regime assumption: trending is the primary edge regime (MACD 12:1 trending PF=2.177), but ranging has also been profitable at lower R:R (MACD 7:1 ranging PF=2.062). Invalidation: if PF < 0.9 across 80+ trades at 15:1, the win rate collapses below the fee floor and extreme R:R is bounded.

variants.name: macd_extreme_tail_15to1
variants.description: MACD histogram zero-cross with EMA_50 trend confirmation at extreme 15:1 R:R. Tests whether the tail harvesting principle scales beyond the proven 12:1 frontier. Stop at 1.0x ATR keeps losses tight; TP at 15.0x ATR captures only the largest directional legs.
entry_long: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from negative to positive (histogram zero-line cross).
Close > EMA_50 confirms bullish trend context.
Bar-close execution only, no intra-bar entries.
entry_short: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from positive to negative (histogram zero-line cross).
Close < EMA_50 confirms bearish trend context.
Bar-close execution only, no intra-bar entries.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (15.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Exit on opposite MACD histogram zero-cross as signal invalidation.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Extreme TP target may never be reached in choppy markets, causing time decay via opportunity cost
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 15.0x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: macd_ultra_tail_18to1
variants.description: MACD at extreme 18:1 R:R — the absolute frontier. Only the rarest, most extended directional moves will hit TP. If this produces PF > 1.0, tail harvesting on crypto has significantly more room than previously assumed. If not, it defines the upper bound.
entry_long: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from negative to positive (histogram zero-line cross).
Close > EMA_50 confirms bullish trend context.
Bar-close execution only, no intra-bar entries.
entry_short: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from positive to negative (histogram zero-line cross).
Close < EMA_50 confirms bearish trend context.
Bar-close execution only, no intra-bar entries.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (18.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Exit on opposite MACD histogram zero-cross as signal invalidation.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: At 18:1, most trades will be stopped out. Success requires sufficient trade count that the rare winners overcome the many small losses.
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 18.0x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: macd_extreme_tail_15to1_1h
variants.description: Same 15:1 extreme tail thesis on 1h timeframe. More signals, smaller ATR, tests whether the edge scales to higher frequency. 1h MACD crosses are noisier but more frequent — at 15:1 R:R, we only need the rare clean breakout to pay for many stopped-out attempts.
entry_long: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from negative to positive (histogram zero-line cross).
Close > EMA_50 confirms bullish trend context.
Bar-close execution only, no intra-bar entries.
entry_short: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from positive to negative (histogram zero-line cross).
Close < EMA_50 confirms bearish trend context.
Bar-close execution only, no intra-bar entries.

exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (15.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Exit on opposite MACD histogram zero-cross as signal invalidation.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: 1h timeframe produces more noise crosses — win rate may drop below fee-adjusted breakeven
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 15.0x ATR_14 from entry.
